chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1004 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4283/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4284/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.08.2023 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> Petitioner is a Higher School Teacher (HST) and presently posted in GBHS attached Elementary College of Education (M), Khairpur, but has been transferred vide impugned Notification dated 09.06.2023 to GBHS attached Elementary College of Education (M), Larkana. He has filed this petition stating that his wife is PST in Education Department Sindh and is posted in Ranipur Taluka Sobhodero, District Khairpur, hence his transfer be cancelled on the basis of wedlock policy. Admittedly, the petitioner is a Civil Servant and further is challenging his transfer which comes within terms and conditions of service. Record does not reveal that before filing this petition, he had approached the competent authority for his or his wife’s transfer as per wedlock policy. No case, therefore, is made out for indulgence. The petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
